title: boissiera pumilio
intro: Boissiera pumilio, also known as the small-boissiera or boissiera, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Boissiera pumilio include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Boissiera pumilio may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
